since_last: 48% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.10%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 48% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.96% · Gold +1.08% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 48% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.10%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.10%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.04%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRNC is the standout at +5.13%
cards.body: Leaders: CRNC +5.13%, AMAT +4.33%, LRCX +4.31%, KLAC +4.12%, ARM +3.85%. Laggards: EQIX -3.58%, CRM -3.50%, WDAY -2.96%, ADBE -2.80%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.52% at $150.55
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.52% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
